activities.title: Unified Account Manager Refactor
activities.description: Build AccountManager service layer with event bus, eliminate silent fallbacks, unify mutation paths across all surfaces, and harden deploy verification.

activities.title: Build AccountManager Service + Event Bus (Slice 0)
activities.description: Create the central AccountManager service, integrate typed event bus, implement write-ahead storage safety, and declare provider capabilities.

activities.title: Define AccountManager API
activities.description: Create account/manager.ts with connectAccount, renameAccount, removeAccount, setActiveAccount, beginLogin, getQuotaHint signatures.

activities.title: Integrate Event Bus
activities.description: Define typed account events (connected/renamed/removed/active-changed) and emit from each mutation method.

activities.title: Implement Write-Ahead Storage
activities.description: Refactor Account.save() to temp-file → rename → update-memory pattern ensuring crash-safe writes.

activities.title: Declare Provider Capabilities
activities.description: Add ProviderCapabilities interface to provider config, replace hardcoded gemini-cli/google-api branches with capability lookups.

activities.title: Setup Event Consumers
activities.description: Wire TUI subscriber, Web SSE channel, and Console SSE listener for account events.

activities.title: Backend Convergence (Slice A+B)
activities.description: Delegate all route mutations to AccountManager, add mismatch guards, eliminate silent fallbacks.

activities.title: Route Service Delegation (Slice A)
activities.description: Rewrite all mutation routes to delegate to AccountManager, add providerKey/family mismatch guard returning 400.

activities.title: Silent Fallback Elimination (Slice B)
activities.description: Auth.set disclosure, UserDaemonManager single-path, mutation target validation, explicit migration logging.

activities.title: CLI/TUI Convergence (Slice C)
activities.description: Replace all direct Account.*/Auth.* mutation calls in CLI and TUI with AccountManager calls.

activities.title: Frontend Convergence (Slice D+E)
activities.description: Unify session-local vs global active authority, align app/console surface contracts, replace console full-reload with SSE sync.

activities.title: Authority Unification (Slice D)
activities.description: Define session-local ephemeral selection vs global active account, implement separate UI badges, handle session-local account deletion.

activities.title: Surface Alignment (Slice E)
activities.description: Unify app/console form semantics, route model-manager actions through AccountManager, replace console reload with SSE.

activities.title: Hardening (Slice F)
activities.description: Automate deploy SHA256 gate, harden Account ID format, completely eliminate family naming drift, make silent migrations explicit.

activities.title: Deploy Gate Automation
activities.description: Add verify_deploy() SHA256 check to webctl.sh, fail dev-refresh on hash mismatch.

activities.title: Legacy Cleanup — Family 完全消除
activities.description: Eliminate parseProvider()/parseFamily() entirely, remove all FamilyData/FAMILIES/resolveFamily exports, rename canonical-family-source → canonical-provider-source, migrate storage key families→providers, make migrations explicit.

arrows.label: Family Elimination Policy + UX Invariance Constraint
Unified Account Manager with Event Bus
